checkpoint.summary: PHASE_001 complete. unit_006 landed the strict v2 validator: required-field enforcement on units, path-safety checks on touches_paths (rejects '..', POSIX absolute, Windows drive-rooted), referential-integrity + cycle detection on both phase and unit depends_on, fleet.mode enum gate. Version gate surfaces the /create-development-harness pointer for v1 fixtures across all four JSON files. Test suite grew from 38 to 65.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_007 (PHASE_002): Rewrite skills/development-harness/scripts/select_next_unit.py around frontier computation; add --frontier and --max N flags; no legacy list-order fallback; preserve stop-hook JSON contract on no-flag call.
